CVE-2019-11484.title: Kevin Backhouse discovered an integer overflow in bson_ensure_spa ...
CVE-2019-11484.summary: Kevin Backhouse discovered an integer overflow in bson_ensure_space, as used in whoopsie.

CVE-2020-12135.title: bson before 0.8 incorrectly uses int rather than size_t for many  ...
CVE-2020-12135.summary: bson before 0.8 incorrectly uses int rather than size_t for many variables, parameters, and return values. In particular, the bson_ensure_space() parameter bytesNeeded could have an integer overflow via properly constructed bson input.
